content: I am a Jr. Research Scientist at NYU Wagner. Prior to joining NYU, I was a Fulbright grantee based at the State University of Londrina. My research interests include health disparities and policy interventions to address them, the political behavior of minority groups, and quantitative methods in the social sciences.

title: Benjamin Zhu
Who Will Pay for COVID-19 Hospital Care: Looking at Payers Across States
